text_original: this is fun. would be nice though that when an Image comes up and says it is a gift it really would Be, instead of costing gems. added after reply: Yes, I realize that, and do pay the gems for images. I just don't like it when a non-gift is called a gift.
text_zh: 这很有趣。不过如果图片出现并声称是礼物时，它真的能成为礼物，而不是需要花费宝石，那就更好了。回复后补充：是的，我明白这一点，而且确实会为图片支付宝石。我只是不喜欢非礼物被称作礼物的情况。
reply_original: Hi there! Thanks for the 5-star review and feedback! We understand your concern about image labels. If you encounter any issues with gift tags or unexpected gem charges, please share screenshots and details to support@fantachat.ai. We’ll investigate and optimize the system to avoid confusion. Your input helps us improve!
reply_zh: 你好！感谢您的五星评价和反馈！我们理解您对图片标签的担忧。如果您在礼品标签或意外宝石收费方面遇到任何问题，请将截图和详细信息发送至support@fantachat.ai。我们将进行调查并优化系统以避免混淆。您的反馈帮助我们不断改进！
